summary_en: 300,000 shares (3.07% of issued S/O excl. treasury) to be acquired for max ¥600M via ToSTNeT-3 on 5 May 2025 before 08:00 JST. Capital efficiency and enterprise value improvement.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Shares and Purchase via Off-Hours ToSTNeT-3 Trading
translation_en_brief: NAC Co., Ltd. announced on 5 May 2025 that its Board of Directors has authorized the acquisition of treasury shares effective under the Companies Act. The company will acquire a maximum of 300,000 ordinary shares (3.07% of outstanding issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a total cost not exceeding ¥600 million. The acquisition will be executed via ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours trading) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange on 5 May 2025, with orders to be placed before 08:00 JST. The results will be disclosed after trading concludes. The acquired shares will be evaluated for optimal deployment in M&A activities, employee share incentive plans (RSU), cancellation, or other uses to enhance enterprise value and capital efficiency.
